subject: A cloaked humanoid figure sprinting across a cobblestone plaza, glancing back over one shoulder while fleeing through a chaotic crowd
description: A hooded figure in a tan cloak with red-accented undershirt is caught mid-stride, leaping across a broad stone plaza. The figure's head turns back over one shoulder in a backward glance suggesting flight or surveillance-avoidance. Behind and around them, a large crowd scatters in multiple directions — armored guards or soldiers are visible at mid-distance, and figures dressed in a variety of styles flee or mill across the scene. In the far background, large angular stone architecture rises against an orange-lit smoky sky suggesting fire or a setting sun obscured by haze. Debris and dust hang in the air. The composition conveys a city in unrest with the cloaked figure as the focal escapee.
foreground: cloaked humanoid figure mid-leap on cobblestone paving
background: crowded city plaza, armored figures, angular stone towers, smoky orange sky
emotion: urgency, furtive backward glance — flight instinct
